elements.grid_ref: between grid1 and grid2, full section from ระดับพื้นชั้น 1 (+0.60) via ระดับพื้นชานพัก (+2.35 landing) up to ระดับพื้นชั้น 2 (+3.75)
elements.description: 18 risers @ 0.175m = 3.15m total rise (0.60 to 3.75), switchback/dog-leg layout with an intermediate landing at +2.35; steel-framed stair with a wall-mounted diagonal stringer, wood handrail on steel posts

elements.material: ราวบันไดไม้เนื้อแข็ง 2"x4" วางนอน (horizontal hardwood cap rail) on steel angle posts: เหล็ก ∟1-1/2"x3" (0.25m), เหล็ก ∟1"x2" (0.15m), เหล็ก ∟1"x1" (0.15m), เหล็ก ∟1"x2" (0.15m), total post height 0.90m above a 0.20m concrete-embedded base
ราวบันไดไม้เนื้อแข็ง 2"x4" วางนอน on a diagonal steel flat bar (FB) 1" wide x 6mm thick painted with oil paint, connected via steel plate เหล็ก PL-4.5mm + BOLT ø10mm to the stringer/wall
ลูกนอนไฟเบอร์ซีเมนต์ ขนาด 1"x12" (fiber-cement tread), ลูกตั้งไฟเบอร์ซีเมนต์ หนา 1" (fiber-cement riser), riser height 0.175m each, tread run sub-split 0.25+0.25+0.25 per printed dimension chain

warnings: This sheet (A-20) is the section + 3 enlarged hardware/construction details for the main inter-floor stair ST.2, companion to the plan views on A-19 (_หน้า21_stair_st2_plans.json).

This is a steel-and-fiber-cement stair (steel diagonal stringer/flat-bar balusters + wood cap rail + fiber-cement tread/riser cladding), materially different from ST.1 (solid ceramic-tile-on-concrete step) and from the 1-story sister houses' stairs (which were simple concrete porch steps) — consistent with this being a full 2-story inter-floor stair requiring a lighter engineered structure.
18 risers @ 0.175m = 3.15m exactly matches the floor1-to-floor2 rise (+0.60 to +3.75) cross-confirmed against the levels printed on every elevation/section sheet in this set.

The intermediate landing level +2.35 (ระดับพื้นชานพัก) is new information from this sheet, consistent with the floor1 plan's 9-riser flight (9 x 0.175 = 1.575, +0.60+1.575=2.175, close to but not exactly +2.35 — small reconciliation gap of about 0.18m between the plan-view riser count and this section's landing level, not resolved, flagged for human review).
